flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southwest Tennessee Community College are 11% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.1k vs $38.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwest Tennessee Community College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (4.9% → 3.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Southwest Tennessee Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.2k vs 6.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southwest Tennessee Community College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (55.6% → 45.7%).
